heading: Authority for exemptions in appropriation laws
label: 1557 Authority for exemptions in appropriation laws
text: A provision of an appropriation law may exempt an appropriation from the provisions of this subchapter and fix the period for which the appropriation remains available for expenditure.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)155731:708., .July 25, 1956, ch. 727, § 970 Stat. 650

Amendments1990— substituted “Authority for exemptions in appropriation laws” for “Authorization to exempt” in section catchline and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “A provision of an appropriation law may exempt an appropriation from this subchapter and fix the period for which the appropriation remains available for expenditure.”Pub. L. 101–510
